texto: I enjoyed the side bars with fun facts and notable sources for where to get more help. Merrin’s such a fun writer
autor: I’d love to see her invite kids into her kitchen for cooking classes. She’d be perfect in the classroom and would entice children to try new foods. It’s the adults that might need fooling.
